description: Full v12 benchmark: all extractors + guided generation mode
key_finding: v12 extractor stack (with FactualKBExtractor) improves accuracy by +11.8% on average across 2 models and 5 domains. Qwen3.5-0.8B benefits most (+14.4%). Best domain: scheduling (+21.0%). Guided generation wins in 10/10 cells (100%) vs verify+repair.
result_header: WARNING: Experiment 117 has no explicit live inference provenance. Keep this artifact for the research record, but treat its metrics as unverified rather than validated live performance.
